problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Casimir. Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
